title: M. Murat Ardag, Ph.D.
text:
Welcome to the landing page of my various websites.

About Me
I am a former academic turned data scientist, now freelancing at the intersection of AI and cybersecurity.





Explore My Work
Some of my projects are available on GitHub  and HuggingFace  Browsing my portfolio website is another option.





More About Me
Read about my professional journey.
To find out more about me as the political psychologist, visit my academic website.
I occasionally make blogposts.
Feel free to connect on LinkedIn  .

title: M. Murat Ardag, Ph.D.
text:
At BCW Global, Europe & Africa1 I worked with teams across the EU and UK to develop three products. I also provided comprehensive data analysis and strategic insights to client teams throughout the EMEA region.
While working in the private sector, I volunteered as the Turkish Language Group Leader in the European Commission Joint Research Centre’s ValuesML - Unravelling Expressed Values in the Media for Informed Policy Making project.
My academic background is in political psychology2, with expertise in psychometrics, psycholinguistics, cross-cultural research, and modeling human subjectivity.
My academic role, prior to transitioning to the private sector, had placed me at the intersection of research and industry. I led the data analysis for a major externally-funded project, fostering a collaboration between a multinational consulting firm and teams from several universities.
In another life, before becoming an academic, I worked as a sales manager at a multinational outdoor advertising company in Istanbul. During my undergrad studies, I worked as a music journalist.
